description_long: This object is a wedge-shaped piece of cheese with a golden-yellow color and numerous round holes of varying sizes distributed across its surfaces, reminiscent of Swiss cheese such as Emmental. The cheese has a smooth, slightly glossy surface with subtle shading that suggests a semi-soft texture. The edges are cleanly cut, and the overall form is a thick triangular prism, with the broadest face displaying the largest holes. There is no visible rind or outer coating, and the cheese appears solid throughout, with the holes penetrating into its body. The coloration is consistent, with darker yellow-orange spots around the holes, enhancing the impression of depth. The cheese is unwrapped and sits alone, with no visible packaging or branding.
description: A wedge of golden-yellow cheese with round holes and a smooth, semi-glossy surface, resembling Swiss cheese. The piece is thick, triangular, and unwrapped.
description_view_0: The broad side of the cheese wedge is visible, showing several large and small round holes and a smooth, slightly shiny surface.
description_view_1: The narrow, pointed end of the cheese is seen, with fewer visible holes and the triangular shape most apparent.
description_view_2: The opposite broad side is shown, similar to view 0 but with a slightly different arrangement of holes and shading.
description_view_3: The back, flat face of the wedge is visible, displaying a few large holes and a uniform surface.
